title: Cif Bathroom Cleaner Spray, 700ml, White, (Pack of 1) (Packaging may vary)
features: Cif Power & Shine Bathroom Spray removes 100% of limescale and soap scum on bathroom surfaces
This bathroom spray is suitable for cleaning ceramic, chrome, enamel, plastic, and stainless-steel surfaces
Our bathroom cleaner contains a 100% naturally sourced cleaning agent and has a 100% bio-degradable fragrance that leaves no harsh smells
Made with water and dirt-repellent technology, Cif Power & Shine Bathroom Spray is tough on dirt and limescale
Powered with Cleanboost technology, Power & Shine Bathroom Spray leaves your bathroom surfaces with a 100% streak-free shine
The bottle for this cleaning spray is 100% recyclable and made with recycled plastic*
100% Soapscum & limescale removal and streak-free shine
description: Product Description Cif Power & Shine Bathroom Spray will keep your bathroom sparkling for longer, thanks to its water and dirt‑repellent technology. Powered by Cleanboost, it quickly lifts away 100% of soap scum and limescale from your tiles and bathroom surfaces without leaving streaks, simply leaving a clean, shiny home. It’s so versatile you can use it on your shower, tiles, grout, sink, or as a bath cleaner. Enjoy streak-free shine on ceramic, chrome, enamel, plastic, and stainless-steel surfaces, first time, every time. Containing a 100% naturally sourced cleaning agent, our bathroom cleaner is gentle on surfaces and has a 100% bio-degradable fragrance, so there will be no harsh smells left behind. The bottle for this bathroom cleaner spray is 100% recyclable and is made with recycled plastic.* For beautiful cleaning results, spray onto the surface, leave for a few seconds, and wipe with a cloth. For tough dirt, leave for a few minutes before wiping clean. For a sparkling home, also try Cif Power & Shine Kitchen Cleaner Spray to cut through tough grease and grime and Cif Power & Shine Antibacterial Spray to eliminate 99.99% of germs. At Cif, we believe in revealing and protecting beauty for everyone to enjoy, every day. That’s why Cif has developed a range of cleaning products that remove ugly dirt without damage. Providing you with beautiful results for over 50 years. *Made with 50% recycled plastic, while we work towards 100% recycled plastic Ingredients <5%: Non-Ionic Surfactant, Perfume, Phenoxyethanol.. Directions For beautiful cleaning results every time, spray onto the surface, leave for a few seconds and wipe with a cloth. For tough dirt leave for a few minutes before wiping clean.;For beautiful cleaning results every time, spray onto the surface, leave for a few seconds and wipe with a cloth. For tough dirt leave for a few minutes before wiping clean. Safety Warning Contains methylchloroisothiazolinone:methylisothiazolinone (3:1). May produce an allergic reaction.
